title: phlomoides tibetica var. wardii
intro: Phlomoides tibetica var. wardii, also known as Ward's flax, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Phlomoides tibetica var. wardii include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
